<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="ar" dir="rtl">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>تيك بيكس — أفضل منتجات التقنية</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cairo:wght@300;400;600;700;900&family=Tajawal:wght@300;400;500;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#07070e;--bg2:#0d0d17;--bg3:#12121e;
  --accent:#c8a96e;--accent2:#e2c98a;--accent3:#8b6914;
  --text:#f2ede6;--muted:#8a8298;--border:rgba(200,169,110,0.13);
  --border2:rgba(255,255,255,0.055);--green:#4ecb8d;--red:#e05c75;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden;}

nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;height:68px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 2.5rem;background:rgba(7,7,14,0.82);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;text-decoration:none;}
.logo-icon{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:8px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent3));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:18px;box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(200,169,110,0.35);}
.logo-text{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:1.3rem;color:var(--text);}
.logo-text span{color:var(--accent);}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2.2rem;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:.88rem;font-weight:600;transition:color .2s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--accent);}
.nav-cta{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));color:#000;border:none;padding:9px 22px;border-radius:8px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-weight:700;font-size:.85rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.nav-cta:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(200,169,110,0.35);}

.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;padding:8rem 2rem 5rem;}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 65% 55% at 15% 50%,rgba(200,169,110,0.07) 0%,transparent 60%),radial-gradient(ellipse 55% 65% at 85% 25%,rgba(139,105,20,0.08) 0%,transparent 60%);}
.hero-content{position:relative;text-align:center;max-width:780px;}
.hero-eyebrow{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(200,169,110,0.3);background:rgba(200,169,110,0.06);color:var(--accent);padding:7px 18px;border-radius:999px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:2rem;animation:fadeUp .7s ease both;}
.hero-eyebrow i{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);animation:blink 2s infinite;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}
.hero h1{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(2.6rem,6.5vw,4.6rem);font-weight:900;line-height:1.12;margin-bottom:1.6rem;animation:fadeUp .7s ease both .1s;}
.hero h1 em{font-style:normal;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;}
.hero-sub{font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--muted);max-width:500px;margin:0 auto 2.8rem;line-height:1.8;animation:fadeUp .7s ease both .2s;}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:12px;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;animation:fadeUp .7s ease both .3s;}
.btn-gold{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));color:#000;padding:14px 34px;border-radius:10px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:.98rem;border:none;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
.btn-gold:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 10px 32px rgba(200,169,110,0.35);}
.btn-ghost{background:transparent;color:var(--text);padding:14px 34px;border-radius:10px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:.98rem;border:1px solid var(--border2);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-decoration:none;display:inline-block;}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
.hero-trust{margin-top:4.5rem;padding-top:3rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border2);display:flex;gap:3.5rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;animation:fadeUp .7s ease both .4s;}
.trust-item{text-align:center;}
.trust-num{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:900;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;}
.trust-lbl{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(22px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}

.section{padding:5.5rem 2rem;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.section-head{text-align:center;margin-bottom:3.5rem;}
.s-label{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:800;letter-spacing:.14em;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:.6rem;}
.section-head h2{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.7rem,4vw,2.5rem);font-weight:800;}
.divider{width:48px;height:2px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),transparent);margin:.9rem auto 0;}

.cats-strip{background:var(--bg2);padding:3.5rem 2rem;}
.cats-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.cats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:12px;margin-top:2.5rem;}
.cat-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:14px;padding:22px 12px 18px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:all .22s;}
.cat-card:hover,.cat-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(200,169,110,0.06);}
.cat-em{font-size:1.7rem;margin-bottom:7px;display:block;}
.cat-nm{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:700;}
.cat-ct{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;}

.filters{display:flex;gap:9px;flex-wrap:wrap;align-items:center;margin-bottom:2rem;}
.f-btn{padding:7px 16px;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid var(--border2);background:transparent;color:var(--muted);font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:.8rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.f-btn:hover,.f-btn.active{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);background:rgba(200,169,110,0.07);}
.f-btn.active{font-weight:700;}
.search-box{margin-right:auto;position:relative;}
.search-box input{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);border-radius:8px;padding:8px 16px 8px 40px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-size:.83rem;width:220px;outline:none;transition:border .2s;}
.search-box input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
.search-box input::placeholder{color:var(--muted);}
.s-ico{position:absolute;left:13px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--muted);font-size:13px;}

.products-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(268px,1fr));gap:18px;}
.p-card{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:18px;overflow:hidden;transition:all .25s;position:relative;display:flex;flex-direction:column;cursor:pointer;}
.p-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);border-color:rgba(200,169,110,0.28);box-shadow:0 18px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
.p-badge{position:absolute;top:12px;right:12px;z-index:2;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:800;}
.b-hot{background:#c0392b;color:#fff;}.b-new{background:var(--green);color:#000;}.b-deal{background:#7c3aed;color:#fff;}.b-top{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));color:#000;}
.p-wish{position:absolute;top:12px;left:12px;z-index:2;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;}
.p-wish:hover,.p-wish.on{color:var(--red);border-color:var(--red);}
.p-img-wrap{height:200px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:var(--bg3);overflow:hidden;}
.p-img-wrap img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:14px;transition:transform .3s;}
.p-card:hover .p-img-wrap img{transform:scale(1.05);}
.p-img-wrap .no-img{font-size:4rem;}
.p-body{padding:1.1rem;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.p-cat{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:5px;}
.p-name{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:5px;line-height:1.4;}
.p-desc{font-size:.79rem;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:10px;flex:1;line-height:1.6;}
.p-trust{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:10px;}
.pt{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:.67rem;color:var(--muted);background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:5px;padding:3px 7px;}
.pt svg{width:11px;height:11px;color:var(--accent);flex-shrink:0;}
.p-meta{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.p-price{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:900;}
.p-price .old{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:line-through;margin-right:5px;}
.p-rating{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:.76rem;color:#f59e0b;}
.p-rating span{color:var(--muted);}
.btn-buy{width:100%;padding:11px;border-radius:9px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));color:#000;border:none;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:.87rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;}
.btn-buy:hover{opacity:.88;transform:translateY(-1px);}

.why-strip{background:var(--bg2);padding:5rem 2rem;}
.why-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.why-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:20px;margin-top:3rem;}
.why-card{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:16px;padding:2rem 1.5rem;transition:all .22s;}
.why-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);}
.why-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:12px;}
.why-title{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;}
.why-desc{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;}

.nl-section{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(200,169,110,0.07),rgba(139,105,20,0.06));border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:5rem 2rem;text-align:center;}
.nl-section h3{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:1.8rem;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:8px;}
.nl-section p{color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:2rem;font-size:.95rem;}
.nl-form{display:flex;gap:10px;max-width:440px;margin:0 auto;}
.nl-form input{flex:1;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--text);border-radius:9px;padding:13px 16px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;outline:none;font-size:.9rem;}
.nl-form input::placeholder{color:var(--muted);}
.nl-form button{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));color:#000;border:none;padding:13px 26px;border-radius:9px;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;cursor:pointer;}

footer{background:var(--bg2);padding:4rem 2rem 1.8rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border2);}
.footer-inner{max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.footer-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:2fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:3rem;margin-bottom:3rem;}
.f-col h4{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:1rem;}
.f-col ul{list-style:none;}
.f-col li{margin-bottom:9px;}
.f-col a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;font-size:.8rem;transition:color .2s;}
.f-col a:hover{color:var(--accent);}
.footer-bottom{border-top:1px solid var(--border2);padding-top:1.5rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;font-size:.75rem;color:var(--muted);}
.footer-bottom a{color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;}
.aff-notice{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:8px;padding:10px 18px;font-size:.73rem;color:var(--muted);text-align:center;margin-bottom:2.5rem;}

/* MODAL */
.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.75);z-index:500;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:1rem;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity .25s;}
.modal-overlay.open{opacity:1;pointer-events:all;}
.modal{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(200,169,110,0.2);border-radius:22px;width:100%;max-width:680px;max-height:90vh;overflow-y:auto;position:relative;transform:translateY(20px);transition:transform .25s;}
.modal-overlay.open .modal{transform:none;}
.modal-head{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:1.5rem;padding:1.8rem 1.8rem 1.2rem;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);}
.modal-img{width:120px;height:120px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:12px;background:var(--bg3);padding:8px;flex-shrink:0;}
.modal-img-ph{width:120px;height:120px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5rem;background:var(--bg3);border-radius:12px;flex-shrink:0;}
.modal-info{flex:1;}
.modal-cat{font-size:.68rem;font-weight:800;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.08em;margin-bottom:5px;}
.modal-name{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:1.35rem;font-weight:900;margin-bottom:6px;}
.modal-desc{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;margin-bottom:10px;}
.modal-price-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.modal-price{font-family:'Tajawal',sans-serif;font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:900;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;}
.modal-old{font-size:.85rem;color:var(--muted);text-decoration:line-through;}
.modal-save{background:var(--accent3);color:#f2ede6;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:5px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:800;}
.modal-close{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--muted);font-size:18px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:all .2s;}
.modal-close:hover{color:var(--text);}
.modal-body{padding:1.5rem 1.8rem;}
.modal-trust{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:10px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.mt-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;}
.mt-icon{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;background:rgba(200,169,110,0.1);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.mt-icon svg{width:18px;height:18px;color:var(--accent);}
.mt-text{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;}
.mt-sub{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--muted);}
.modal-rating{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:1.5rem;padding:12px 14px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.03);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:10px;}
.modal-stars{color:#f59e0b;font-size:1.1rem;}
.modal-btn{display:block;width:100%;padding:15px;border-radius:11px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--accent),var(--accent2));color:#000;border:none;font-family:'Cairo',sans-serif;font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-align:center;text-decoration:none;}
.modal-btn:hover{opacity:.88;transform:translateY(-1px);}

.toast{position:fixed;bottom:28px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(90px);background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid rgba(200,169,110,0.35);color:var(--text);padding:13px 28px;border-radius:12px;font-size:.86rem;font-weight:600;z-index:999;transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);pointer-events:none;box-shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
.toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}
.rev{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);transition:all .55s ease;}
.rev.in{opacity:1;transform:none;}

@media(max-width:768px){
  .nav-links{display:none;}
  .footer-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .nl-form{flex-direction:column;}
  .modal-trust{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .modal-head{flex-direction:column;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<nav>
  <a href="#" class="logo">
    <div class="logo-icon">⚡</div>
    <div class="logo-text">تيك<span>بيكس</span></div>
  </a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#products">المنتجات</a></li>
    <li><a href="#deals">العروض</a></li>
    <li><a href="#why">لماذا نحن</a></li>
    <li><a href="#footer">تواصل</a></li>
  </ul>
  <button class="nav-cta" onclick="document.getElementById('products').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'})">تصفح الآن</button>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-content">
    <div class="hero-eyebrow"><i></i>Amazon Associates — السعودية والإمارات</div>
    <h1>اكتشف <em>أفضل التقنية</em><br>بأسعار حصرية</h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">نختار لك كل يوم أفضل المنتجات التقنية من أمازون — مراجعات حقيقية، روابط مباشرة، وتحديثات يومية.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#products" class="btn-gold">تصفح المنتجات</a>
      <a href="#deals" class="btn-ghost">🔥 عروض اليوم</a>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-trust">
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-num">+500</div><div class="trust-lbl">منتج مراجَع</div></div>
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-num">4.8★</div><div class="trust-lbl">متوسط التقييم</div></div>
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-num">يومي</div><div class="trust-lbl">تحديث الأسعار</div></div>
      <div class="trust-item"><div class="trust-num">24/7</div><div class="trust-lbl">دعم وتوصيات</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="cats-strip">
  <div class="cats-inner">
    <div class="section-head rev" style="text-align:right;margin-bottom:0;">
      <div class="s-label">تصفح حسب الفئة</div>
      <h2>ما الذي تبحث عنه؟</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="cats-grid rev">
      <div class="cat-card active" onclick="filterCat('all',this)"><span class="cat-em">🛒</span><div class="cat-nm">الكل</div><div class="cat-ct" id="ct-all">0 منتج</div></div>
      <div class="cat-card" onclick="filterCat('phone',this)"><span class="cat-em">📱</span><div class="cat-nm">هواتف</div><div class="cat-ct" id="ct-phone">0</div></div>
      <div class="cat-card" onclick="filterCat('laptop',this)"><span class="cat-em">💻</span><div class="cat-nm">لابتوبات</div><div class="cat-ct" id="ct-laptop">0</div></div>
      <div class="cat-card" onclick="filterCat('audio',this)"><span class="cat-em">🎧</span><div class="cat-nm">صوتيات</div><div class="cat-ct" id="ct-audio">0</div></div>
      <div class="cat-card" onclick="filterCat('accessories',this)"><span class="cat-em">⌚</span><div class="cat-nm">إكسسوارات</div><div class="cat-ct" id="ct-accessories">0</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<section id="products" class="section">
  <div id="deals"></div>
  <div class="filters rev">
    <button class="f-btn active" onclick="sortP('default',this)">الافتراضي</button>
    <button class="f-btn" onclick="sortP('price-asc',this)">السعر: الأقل</button>
    <button class="f-btn" onclick="sortP('price-desc',this)">السعر: الأعلى</button>
    <button class="f-btn" onclick="sortP('rating',this)">الأعلى تقييمًا</button>
    <div class="search-box">
      <span class="s-ico">🔍</span>
      <input type="text" placeholder="ابحث عن منتج..." id="sInput" oninput="searchP(this.value)">
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="products-grid" id="pGrid"></div>
  <div id="noRes" style="display:none;text-align:center;color:var(--muted);padding:4rem;font-size:1rem;">لا توجد منتجات بعد — أضف أول منتج! 🚀</div>
</section>

<div class="why-strip" id="why">
  <div class="why-inner">
    <div class="section-head rev">
      <div class="s-label">ميزاتنا</div>
      <h2>لماذا تثق بتيك بيكس؟</h2>
      <div class="divider"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="why-grid rev">
      <div class="why-card"><div class="why-icon">🎯</div><div class="why-title">اختيار دقيق</div><div class="why-desc">نراجع كل منتج بعناية ولا نوصي إلا بما يستحق المال الفعلي.</div></div>
      <div class="why-card"><div class="why-icon">🔄</div><div class="why-title">تحديث يومي</div><div class="why-desc">أسعار وعروض أمازون تتغير يومياً — نحن نتابعها بدلاً عنك.</div></div>
      <div class="why-card"><div class="why-icon">🛡️</div><div class="why-title">شراء آمن</div><div class="why-desc">جميع الروابط مباشرة لأمازون. لا وسيط، لا مخاطرة.</div></div>
      <div class="why-card"><div class="why-icon">💎</div><div class="why-title">أفضل الأسعار</div><div class="why-desc">نبحث في الكتالوج الكامل لنجد لك أفضل صفقة متاحة.</div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="nl-section">
  <div class="rev">
    <h3>🔔 لا تفوّت عرضًا</h3>
    <p>اشترك واحصل على تنبيه فوري عند نزول أفضل الصفقات</p>
    <div class="nl-form">
      <input type="email" placeholder="بريدك الإلكتروني">
      <button onclick="toast('✅ تم الاشتراك بنجاح!')">اشترك مجانًا</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<footer id="footer">
  <div class="footer-inner">
    <div class="aff-notice">⚠️ يحتوي هذا الموقع على روابط تابعة (Affiliate Links) لبرنامج Amazon Associates — عند الشراء عبرها نحصل على عمولة بسيطة دون أي تكلفة إضافية عليك.</div>
    <div class="footer-grid">
      <div class="f-col">
        <a href="#" class="logo" style="margin-bottom:1rem;display:inline-flex;">
          <div class="logo-icon">⚡</div>
          <div class="logo-text">تيك<span>بيكس</span></div>
        </a>
        <p style="color:var(--muted);font-size:.82rem;line-height:1.8;">موقع مستقل متخصص في توصية أفضل منتجات التقنية عبر Amazon Associates.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="f-col"><h4>الفئات</h4><ul><li><a href="#">هواتف ذكية</a></li><li><a href="#">لابتوبات</a></li><li><a href="#">سماعات</a></li><li><a href="#">ساعات ذكية</a></li></ul></div>
      <div class="f-col"><h4>روابط سريعة</h4><ul><li><a href="#">العروض اليومية</a></li><li><a href="#">الأعلى تقييمًا</a></li><li><a href="#">منتجات جديدة</a></li></ul></div>
      <div class="f-col"><h4>الموقع</h4><ul><li><a href="#">من نحن</a></li><li><a href="#">سياسة الخصوصية</a></li><li><a href="#">اتصل بنا</a></li></ul></div>
    </div>
    <div class="footer-bottom">
      <span>© 2025 تيك بيكس — جميع الحقوق محفوظة</span>
      <span>شريك رسمي لـ <a href="#">Amazon Associates</a></span>
    </div>
  </div>
</footer>

<!-- MODAL -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="modalOverlay" onclick="closeModal(event)">
  <div class="modal" id="modal">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeModalDirect()">✕</button>
    <div class="modal-head">
      <div id="m-imgWrap"></div>
      <div class="modal-info">
        <div class="modal-cat" id="m-cat"></div>
        <div class="modal-name" id="m-name"></div>
        <div class="modal-desc" id="m-desc"></div>
        <div class="modal-price-row">
          <div class="modal-price" id="m-price"></div>
          <div class="modal-old" id="m-old"></div>
          <div class="modal-save" id="m-save" style="display:none"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="modal-trust">
        <div class="mt-item"><div class="mt-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2z"/></svg></div><div><div class="mt-text">15 يوم للإرجاع</div><div class="mt-sub">إرجاع مجاني ومضمون</div></div></div>
        <div class="mt-item"><div class="mt-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="1" y="3" width="15" height="13"/><polygon points="16 8 20 8 23 11 23 16 16 16 16 8"/><circle cx="5.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"/><circle cx="18.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"/></svg></div><div><div class="mt-text">توصيل مجاني</div><div class="mt-sub">عند الشراء من أمازون</div></div></div>
        <div class="mt-item"><div class="mt-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 12 20 22 4 22 4 12"/><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="5"/></svg></div><div><div class="mt-text">تشحن من أمازون</div><div class="mt-sub">جودة وسرعة مضمونة</div></div></div>
        <div class="mt-item"><div class="mt-icon"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg></div><div><div class="mt-text">معاملتك آمنة</div><div class="mt-sub">دفع مشفر وموثوق</div></div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="modal-rating" id="m-rating"></div>
      <a class="modal-btn" id="m-btn" href="#" target="_blank">اشترِ الآن من أمازون ↗</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="toast" id="toastEl"></div>

<script>
const PRODUCTS=[
  {
    id:1,
    name:"باور بانك من أنكر 10000 مللي امبير",
    cat:"accessories",
    desc:"منفذ USB-C و USB-A مع شحن لاسلكي ومغناطيسي للهاتف الذكي، بمنفذين، لون أسود",
    price:148.99,
    old:168,
    rating:4.3,
    rev:2118,
    badge:"hot",
    img:"data:image/jpeg;base64,",
    icon:"🔋",
    link:"https://www.amazon.sa/10000-%D9%84%D8%A7%D8%B3%D9%84%D9%83%D9%8A-%D9%85%D8%BA%D9%86%D8%A7%D8%B7%D9%8A%D8%B3%D9%8A-%D9%84%D9%84%D9%87%D8%A7%D8%AA%D9%81-%D8%A8%D9%85%D9%86%D9%81%D8%B0%D9%8A%D9%86/dp/B0B7JC6C5H?pd_rd_w=u2V4L&content-id=amzn1.sym.8131e2e0-15b9-4746-8e4a-222614b342f7%3Aamzn1.symc.30e3dbb4-8dd8-4bad-b7a1-a45bcdbc49b8&pf_rd_p=8131e2e0-15b9-4746-8e4a-222614b342f7&pf_rd_r=ZVV2PYHPRBDRJWW6Y152&pd_rd_wg=PhzOG&pd_rd_r=35ae2f79-1b12-490e-9db8-56faf7c94fa3&pd_rd_i=B0B7JC6C5H&th=1&linkCode=ll2&tag=techpix0f-21&linkId=4f9db16b0f42c2c04cf4ef58b7a1f5b0&ref_=as_li_ss_tl"
  },
];

const BL={hot:"b-hot",new:"b-new",deal:"b-deal",top:"b-top"};
const BT={hot:"🔥 الأكثر مبيعًا",new:"✨ جديد",deal:"💜 عرض",top:"⭐ الأفضل"};
const CL={phone:"هواتف ذكية",laptop:"لابتوبات",audio:"صوتيات",accessories:"إكسسوارات"};
const TRUST_SVG={
  ret:`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 01-2 2H5a2 2 0 01-2-2z"/></svg>`,
  ship:`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><rect x="1" y="3" width="15" height="13"/><polygon points="16 8 20 8 23 11 23 16 16 16 16 8"/><circle cx="5.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"/><circle cx="18.5" cy="18.5" r="2.5"/></svg>`,
  amz:`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><polyline points="20 12 20 22 4 22 4 12"/><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="5"/></svg>`,
  safe:`<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M12 22s8-4 8-10V5l-8-3-8 3v7c0 6 8 10 8 10z"/></svg>`
};

let cat="all",sort="default",q="",wish=new Set();

function render(){
  let l=[...PRODUCTS];
  if(cat!=="all") l=l.filter(p=>p.cat===cat);
  if(q) l=l.filter(p=>p.name.includes(q)||p.desc.includes(q));
  if(sort==="price-asc") l.sort((a,b)=>a.price-b.price);
  else if(sort==="price-desc") l.sort((a,b)=>b.price-a.price);
  else if(sort==="rating") l.sort((a,b)=>b.rating-a.rating);
  const g=document.getElementById('pGrid'),nr=document.getElementById('noRes');
  if(!l.length){g.innerHTML="";nr.style.display="block";return;}
  nr.style.display="none";
  g.innerHTML=l.map(p=>{
    const sv=p.old?Math.round((1-p.price/p.old)*100):0;
    const imgHtml=p.img
      ?`<img src="${p.img}" alt="${p.name}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:14px;transition:transform .3s;" onerror="this.parentElement.innerHTML='<div class=no-img>${p.icon||'📦'}</div>'">`
      :`<div class="no-img">${p.icon||'📦'}</div>`;
    return`<div class="p-card" onclick="openModal(${p.id})">
      <div class="p-badge ${BL[p.badge]}">${BT[p.badge]}</div>
      <button class="p-wish ${wish.has(p.id)?'on':''}" onclick="toggleW(event,${p.id},this)">${wish.has(p.id)?'❤️':'🤍'}</button>
      <div class="p-img-wrap">${imgHtml}</div>
      <div class="p-body">
        <div class="p-cat">${CL[p.cat]||p.cat}</div>
        <div class="p-name">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="p-desc">${p.desc}</div>
        <div class="p-trust">
          <span class="pt">${TRUST_SVG.ret}15 يوم إرجاع</span>
          <span class="pt">${TRUST_SVG.ship}توصيل مجاني</span>
          <span class="pt">${TRUST_SVG.amz}أمازون</span>
          <span class="pt">${TRUST_SVG.safe}آمن</span>
        </div>
        <div class="p-meta">
          <div class="p-price">${p.old?`<span class="old">${p.old.toLocaleString('ar')} ر.س</span>`:''}${p.price.toLocaleString('ar')} ر.س${sv?` <span style="font-size:.7rem;background:var(--accent3);color:#f2ede6;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;margin-right:4px;">-${sv}%</span>`:''}</div>
          <div class="p-rating">⭐ ${p.rating} <span>(${p.rev.toLocaleString('ar')})</span></div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn-buy" onclick="event.stopPropagation();window.open('${p.link}','_blank')">اشترِ من أمازون ↗</button>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  }).join('');
  updateCounts();
}

function updateCounts(){
  document.getElementById('ct-all').textContent=PRODUCTS.length+' منتج';
  ['phone','laptop','audio','accessories'].forEach(c=>{
    document.getElementById('ct-'+c).textContent=PRODUCTS.filter(p=>p.cat===c).length;
  });
}

function openModal(id){
  const p=PRODUCTS.find(x=>x.id===id);if(!p)return;
  const iw=document.getElementById('m-imgWrap');
  iw.innerHTML=p.img
    ?`<img src="${p.img}" class="modal-img" alt="${p.name}" onerror="this.outerHTML='<div class=modal-img-ph>${p.icon||'📦'}</div>'">`
    :`<div class="modal-img-ph">${p.icon||'📦'}</div>`;
  document.getElementById('m-cat').textContent=CL[p.cat]||p.cat;
  document.getElementById('m-name').textContent=p.name;
  document.getElementById('m-desc').textContent=p.desc;
  document.getElementById('m-price').textContent=p.price.toLocaleString('ar')+' ر.س';
  const oe=document.getElementById('m-old'),se=document.getElementById('m-save');
  if(p.old){oe.textContent=p.old.toLocaleString('ar')+' ر.س';se.textContent='وفّر '+Math.round((1-p.price/p.old)*100)+'%';se.style.display='';}
  else{oe.textContent='';se.style.display='none';}
  document.getElementById('m-rating').innerHTML=`<span class="modal-stars">${'★'.repeat(Math.round(p.rating))}${'☆'.repeat(5-Math.round(p.rating))}</span><span style="font-size:.9rem;margin-right:8px;">${p.rating}</span><span style="font-size:.8rem;color:var(--muted);">(${p.rev.toLocaleString('ar')} مراجعة)</span>`;
  document.getElementById('m-btn').href=p.link;
  document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.add('open');
  document.body.style.overflow='hidden';
}
function closeModal(e){if(e.target===document.getElementById('modalOverlay'))closeModalDirect();}
function closeModalDirect(){document.getElementById('modalOverlay').classList.remove('open');document.body.style.overflow='';}
function filterCat(c,el){cat=c;document.querySelectorAll('.cat-card').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('active'));el.classList.add('active');render();}
function sortP(s,el){sort=s;document.querySelectorAll('.f-btn').forEach(e=>e.classList.remove('active'));el.classList.add('active');render();}
function searchP(v){q=v.trim();render();}
function toggleW(e,id,btn){
  e.stopPropagation();
  wish.has(id)?(wish.delete(id),btn.textContent='🤍',btn.classList.remove('on'),toast('تمت الإزالة من المفضلة')):(wish.add(id),btn.textContent='❤️',btn.classList.add('on'),toast('❤️ أضيف إلى المفضلة!'));
}
function toast(msg){const t=document.getElementById('toastEl');t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('show');setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),2800);}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{if(e.key==='Escape')closeModalDirect();});
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(es=>es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('in');obs.unobserve(e.target);}}),{threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.rev').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
render();
</script>
</body>
</html>
